svg.text: The plan now: map how a judge's installed preference
docs/PLAN.md — the single canonical plan (dynamics re-anchor 07-11 ~12:00; statuses Saturday afternoon: K1 + K3 running on Kaggle, v10 judge top-up next on Colab); chips show what has already landed
Instrument & organism build (Colab lane, gates the Kaggle window)
Phase 1A — Qwen anchor grid: 4 judge conditions × 4 seeds × 4 rounds, +1 measure-only (K1, ~12.5 h)
Phase 1B — OLMo judge swap: the trajectory map under an installed conservative taste (Kaggle K2, ~20.5 h: 6+3 seeds)
The rest of the sprint — K1 + K3 running in parallel on Kaggle; K2 preempts on gate-pass; then K2 controls → K4
runs only if K1–K3 finish early.
